description: Create the complete Android project structure with Gradle setup, dependencies, theme, navigation, and all screen scaffolds. This includes: project initialization, dependency configuration (Retrofit, DataStore, Navigation Compose, Material3, Hilt), custom dark mystic theme, MVVM architecture layers (data/domain/ui), API service interfaces, repository layer, ViewModels, and all screen composables with navigation graph.
steps: Create Android project at /projects/sandbox/Mobile-Apps/MysticNusa/ with proper Gradle Kotlin DSL build files (settings.gradle.kts, root build.gradle.kts, app/build.gradle.kts). Use compileSdk 34, minSdk 26, targetSdk 34. Add dependencies: Retrofit + Gson converter, OkHttp logging interceptor, Jetpack Compose BOM, Navigation Compose, Material3, DataStore Preferences, Hilt, Coil for image loading, Kotlin Coroutines.
Create the app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml with INTERNET permission and application setup.

Create the theme package at app/src/main/java/com/mysticnusa/app/ui/theme/ with Color.kt (MysticDarkBackground=#0e0e1a, MysticSurface=#1e293b, MysticGold=#facc15, MysticGoldDark=#ffd700, MysticPurple=#7c3aed, MysticPurpleLight=#a278ff, MysticPurpleSoft=#b88aff, TextPrimary=white, TextSecondary=#cccccc), Type.kt, and Theme.kt with dark Material3 color scheme.

Create the data layer: data/remote/ApiService.kt (Retrofit interface with ALL endpoints: POST /auth/register, POST /auth/login, POST /auth/logout, POST /auth/wallet, GET /profile, GET /profile/token-history, POST /airdrop/claim, POST /airdrop/claim-code, GET /news, GET /stories, GET /staking/types, POST /staking/stake, GET /staking, POST /staking/{id}/claim, POST /staking/{id}/cancel, POST /games/trivia/start, POST /games/trivia/answer, POST /games/trivia/finish, GET /games/trivia/leaderboard, POST /games/logical/start, POST /games/logical/answer, POST /games/logical/finish, GET /games/logical/leaderboard, GET /games/logical/statistics, POST /games/intuition/start, GET /games/intuition/{matchId}/round-items, POST /games/intuition/{matchId}/answer, GET /games/intuition/leaderboard, GET /games/intuition/statistics, POST /games/tarot/start, POST /games/tarot/pick-cards, POST /games/tarot/ai-reading, GET /games/tarot/history, and placeholder endpoints for ulartangga and ngepet).
Create data/remote/RetrofitInstance.kt with configurable BASE_URL, OkHttp client with auth interceptor that reads token from DataStore, and Gson converter.
Create data/local/TokenManager.kt using DataStore Preferences to store/retrieve auth token and basic user info.

Create data/models/ package with all data classes: AuthRequest, AuthResponse, UserProfile, TokenHistory, NewsItem, StoryItem, StakingType, StakingDuration, UserStaking, AirdropClaimRequest, AirdropCodeRequest, TriviaStartRequest, TriviaStartResponse, TriviaAnswerRequest, TriviaAnswerResponse, TriviaFinishResponse, LogicalStartResponse, LogicalAnswerRequest, LogicalAnswerResponse, LogicalFinishResponse, IntuitionStartResponse, IntuitionRoundResponse, IntuitionAnswerRequest, TarotStartResponse, TarotPickRequest, TarotReadingResponse, PaginatedResponse<T>.

Create data/repository/ with AuthRepository, ProfileRepository, AirdropRepository, NewsRepository, StoryRepository, StakingRepository, GamesRepository - each wrapping ApiService calls with error handling and returning Result<T>.

Create the navigation package: navigation/Screen.kt (sealed class with all routes: Splash, Login, Register, Home, Profile, TokenHistory, Claim, News, Stories, Games, TriviaGame, LogicalGame, IntuitionGame, TarotGame, UlartanggaGame, NgepetGame, Staking) and navigation/NavGraph.kt with NavHost composable wiring all screens.

Create ui/screens/ with scaffold composables for ALL screens: SplashScreen, LoginScreen, RegisterScreen, HomeScreen, ProfileScreen, TokenHistoryScreen, ClaimScreen, NewsScreen, NewsDetailScreen, StoriesScreen, StoryDetailScreen, GamesScreen (hub), TriviaGameScreen, LogicalGameScreen, IntuitionGameScreen, TarotGameScreen, UlartanggaGameScreen, NgepetGameScreen, StakingScreen. Each screen should have basic structure with TopAppBar and content placeholder.

Create ui/viewmodels/ with ViewModels for each feature: AuthViewModel, ProfileViewModel, AirdropViewModel, NewsViewModel, StoryViewModel, StakingViewModel, TriviaViewModel, LogicalViewModel, IntuitionViewModel, TarotViewModel.
Create ui/components/ with reusable composables: MysticButton, MysticCard, MysticTextField, LoadingIndicator, ErrorMessage, BottomNavBar (with Home, Games, Claim, Profile tabs).
Create MainActivity.kt that sets up the Compose content with theme and NavGraph, checking auth state on startup.
Create Application class with Hilt setup if using DI, or manual DI container.
acceptance_criteria: Running ./gradlew assembleDebug from MysticNusa/ compiles successfully without errors
Project structure follows MVVM with clear separation: data/, ui/, navigation/ packages
All API endpoints from the reference controllers are defined in ApiService.kt
Custom dark mystic theme is properly defined with gold/purple accent colors
Navigation graph includes routes for all screens: auth, home, profile, claim, news, stories, games (6 game types), staking
Bottom navigation bar is present with Home, Games, Claim, Profile tabs
verification: Verify compilation succeeds with exit code 0
findings: Android SDK was not pre-installed, had to install commandlinetools and SDK platform-34 + build-tools 34.0.0. Java 17 is at /root/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17.0.2. Gradle wrapper generated for 8.5. ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk. Build succeeded with only deprecation warnings (ArrowBack icon) and unused parameter warnings. local.properties must point to sdk.dir=/opt/android-sdk. The project compiles with: export JAVA_HOME=/root/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17.0.2 && export ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk && ./gradlew assembleDebug --no-daemon
